name: Backblaze B2
description: S3-compatible cloud storage at a fraction of AWS costs. $6/TB/month with free egress to Cloudflare. Ideal for backups, media, and app storage.

name: Dropbox
description: Cloud storage with automatic device sync, shared folders, and collaboration tools for teams and individuals.

name: Google Drive
description: Google's cloud storage with 15GB free. Stores files, Docs, Sheets, and Slides — accessible and shareable from anywhere.

name: Imgur
description: Fast image and GIF hosting. Upload images, share links instantly, and browse a huge community-driven content feed.

name: MediaFire
description: Cloud file hosting for storing and sharing large files. Includes a free tier with browser upload and direct download links.

name: MEGA
description: End-to-end encrypted cloud storage with 20GB free. Strong privacy focus with zero-knowledge architecture.

name: OneDrive
description: Microsoft's cloud storage with 5GB free. Syncs seamlessly with Windows and Microsoft 365 apps.

name: Storj
description: Decentralized, S3-compatible cloud storage. Files are encrypted client-side and distributed across a global network of nodes. 25GB free tier.

name: Google Drive
description: 15GB free cloud storage from Google. Integrated with Docs, Sheets, Slides, and the entire Google ecosystem.

name: MEGA
description: 20GB free encrypted cloud storage. End-to-end encryption means only you can access your files — not even MEGA.

name: OneDrive
description: Microsoft's cloud storage, integrated with Windows and Office 365. 5GB free, seamless Office file editing.

name: Pastebin
description: Store and share text snippets, code, logs, or any text publicly or privately with a simple shareable link.

name: WeTransfer
description: Send large files up to 2GB for free without sign-up. Just upload, share the link, and files expire in 7 days.

name: Box
description: Enterprise-grade cloud storage with strong compliance and security features. 10GB free for personal use.

name: iCloud
description: Apple's cloud storage and sync service. 5GB free, tightly integrated with iPhone, iPad, and Mac.

name: pCloud
description: Lifetime cloud storage plans — pay once, own it forever. Includes built-in media player and client-side encryption option.

name: Internxt
description: Zero-knowledge encrypted cloud storage based in the EU. Privacy-first alternative with a generous free tier.

name: Filen
description: End-to-end encrypted cloud storage with a clean interface. 10GB free, zero-knowledge architecture by default.
